headline: Copart (NASDAQ:CPRT): A Growth at a Reasonable Price Stock Meeting Peter Lynch Criteria
summary: Copart (CPRT) meets Peter Lynch's "growth at reasonable price" criteria with 20% EPS growth, zero debt, strong margins, and a PEG of 0.85. This dominant vehicle auction platform offers sustainable compounding for long-term investors.
